content.title: Scan to meet with Riseup Asia LLC
content.subtitle: Point your camera at the QR. We'll send a calendar invite the moment you pick a slot — no forms, no follow-up email tag.

notes: Hold for the room to scan. The first capsule is the brand mark; the rest set expectations (length / cost / who they're meeting). Compact layout (no contactRows + no cta) so the QR is the hero — the contact card on /6 is the deeper version.
